steps.title: Apply the complementary-angle identity from the given condition
steps.content: In a right triangle the two acute angles are complementary, so $\sin C = \cos A$. Given $\cos A = 0.55$.

steps.title: Compute the target value
steps.content: Therefore $\sin C = 0.55$. That is the correct answer.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches 0.55, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
